commands.review_summary:
This PR threads the existing one-shot cleanup flag through gateway CLI and embedded Codex paths, retires shared Codex app-server clients on completed and pre-turn failure exits, and adds focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +29, Tests +175. Total +204 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main omits the cleanup flag on gateway agent requests and does not forward it into Codex attempts; the PR also supplies live gateway smoke output showing no lingering child processes after the fix.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains from this review; maintainer judgment is needed for the gateway lifecycle compatibility change and stale requested-changes state.

target.title: Fix one-shot Codex app-server teardown
target.body:
## Summary
- Close the Codex app-server shared client after one-shot OpenClaw agent runs finish.
- Thread cleanup metadata through gateway/CLI agent paths so CLI sessions do not leave app-server or Agent Hub proxy children behind.
- Add regression coverage for cleanup, gateway propagation, and session resume behavior.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior or issue addressed:** One-shot Codex/OpenClaw agent runs could leave shared app-server and Agent Hub proxy children alive after the run ended, which made Jarvis/fleet sessions accumulate stale processes and degraded multi-session reliability.
- **Real environment tested:** Live managed OpenClaw runtime on `openclaw-vm01`, host runtime `OpenClaw 2026.6.2 (a23b0c7)`, managed plugin `@openclaw/codex 2026.6.2`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran a Jarvis managed-plugin smoke session through the real OpenClaw gateway using session `agent:jarvis:teardown-source-aligned-smoke-20260609161031`; then checked runtime cleanup logs and waited 25 seconds before checking for lingering `codex app-server` or `agent-hub-proxy.ts` children.
- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal output from the live smoke showed `embedded fallback: false`, assistant reply `gateway path ok`, cleanup log `activeLeases=0 closed=true matchedSharedClient=true`, and the 25s post-run process check found no Codex app-server or Agent Hub proxy children except the grep process.
- **Observed result after fix:** The live run completed on the gateway path and cleaned up the shared managed-plugin client without leaving stale child processes behind.
- **What was not tested:** Full production merge/release rollout was not tested in this PR; validation was limited to local CI-equivalent gates plus the live managed-plugin smoke on `openclaw-vm01`.

## Validation
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm tsgo:prod`
- `pnpm lint --threads=8`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.process.config.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm run lint:tmp:no-raw-channel-fetch`
- `pnpm protocol:gen && pnpm protocol:gen:swift` with generated Swift protocol artifact included
- Focused teardown/gateway tests and package/tarball validation were run before the live deployment smoke.
target.author: aliahnaf2013-max
